title: Kanecta Items Index
description: Schema for a Kanecta items.json index file. Used in two locations: .kanecta/tags/{shard1}/{shard2}/{tag}/items.json (lists all items carrying that tag), and .kanecta/types/{shard1}/{shard2}/{uuid}/items.json (lists all items of that custom type). Both share the same shape.

items.description: UUIDs of items associated with this index entry. Order is not significant.
